name: mic C++23 sandpit (gcc-14 + Boost)
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y g++-14 libboost-dev valgrind kcachegrind cmake

postAttachCommand.hint: echo 'Ready. Build the benchmark (Boost column auto-on): g++-14 -std=c++23 -O3 -DNDEBUG -I include benchmarks/bench.cpp -o bench && ./bench 100000 1000000'
